svg.aria-label: Amplifier six-layer architecture diagram showing nested layers from kernel at center to community ecosystem at edge
svg.title: FIG. 02 — Amplifier Six-Layer Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing six concentric nested rectangular layers of the Amplifier system. At the center, the KERNEL layer contains five components: Coordinator, Hooks, Session Lifecycle, Contracts, and Module Loader. Surrounding it is the MODULES layer with Orchestrator, Providers, Tools, Context Managers, and Hook Handlers. Further out is BUNDLES (text configuration files requiring no code), then FOUNDATION (turns bundles into running sessions), then APPLICATIONS (CLI, web, IDE, voice interfaces), and at the outermost ring, COMMUNITY (third-party modules, bundles, and recipes). Dependency arrows flow inward — each layer depends only on the layers below it. The kernel at center depends on nothing.

text.tspan: — The architecture as concentric layers. Each layer depends only on the one below it. The kernel at center depends on nothing.
